violations.description: CONTAMINATION FROM WIPING CLOTHS (2 pts): Wiping cloths noted not stored in adequate sanitizing solution.
REFUSE STORAGE (1 pts): (Shared) exterior garbage container noted not covered with a tight fitting lid. (lid is up)
COLD AND HOT STORAGE EQUIPMENT (4 pts): True prep cooler beneath grill area being used for cold holding temp of 41 degrees F was not functioning adequately; was un-plugged from wall.
REFUSE STORAGE (1 pts): ( Shared ) exterior garbage container noted not covered with tight fitting lids. ( lids are up )
TOILET FACILITIES (1 pts): A covered waste receptacle was not provided in women's toilet room. Drop-down diaper changing table noted in need of cleaning.
